category_sources: source_facts.description says kernel debugging shell for Java; official GitHub README describes CRaSH as a shell for extending Java programs and the JVM: https://github.com/crashub/crash#readme
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses the stylized name CRaSH for Common Reusable SHell: https://github.com/crashub/crash#readme
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is available and says Documentation is http://www.crashub.org; source_facts.homepage supplies the archived crashub.org homepage URL.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README says CRaSH can be obtained by cloning git@github.com:crashub/crash.git: https://github.com/crashub/crash#readme
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Java debugging shell behavior; official README describes a Java/JVM shell and lists shell distributions: https://github.com/crashub/crash#readme
